description: You are a Platform Engineer onboarding two development teams to your shared Rancher-managed Kubernetes platform. Configure multi-tenant boundaries using Rancher's Project system in the 'local' cluster. Create four local Rancher users: Alice Chen (alice-chen / AlphaLead2024!), Bob Kumar (bob-kumar / AlphaDev2024!!), Carol Santos (carol-santos / BetaLead2024!), and Dave O'Connor (dave-oconnor / BetaDev2024!!). Establish two projects named 'backend-services' and 'frontend-services'. Move the existing 'staging' namespace into 'backend-services' and create a new namespace 'frontend-staging' within 'frontend-services'. Assign Alice Chen as Project Owner and Bob Kumar as Project Member for 'backend-services', and assign Carol Santos as Project Owner and Dave O'Connor as Project Member for 'frontend-services'. Access the Rancher dashboard at https://localhost using admin / Admin12345678!.
